metadata.description: Vantage.os — Marketing Intelligence OS. Beautiful, evidence-backed competitive teardowns and marketing creation (positioning, ads, content, lifecycle), inside your agent.

plugins.name: vantage
plugins.description: Vantage.os — Marketing Intelligence OS. ANALYZE the field (Digital Share-of-Voice index, positioning map, competitive matrix, sales battlecards) and BUILD your marketing (positioning & messaging house, paid-media ad concepts, content plan, lifecycle/email flows). Every skill delivers a beautiful self-contained HTML report. Web-only, no API keys. 13 skills across 5 packs, driven by a one-question-at-a-time /vantage console.
